heading: Membership
label: 150703 Membership
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15070336:436., .Aug. 13, 1953, ch. 427, § 667 Stat. 563
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15070336:436., .Aug. 13, 1953, ch. 427, § 667 Stat. 563

children.heading: .—Eligibility
children.label: a .—Eligibility
children.text: Membership in the corporation is confined to agencies and organizations. Except as provided in this chapter, the rights and privileges of members are as provided in the bylaws.

children.heading: .—Voting
children.label: b .—Voting
children.text: Each agency or organization sending delegates to, and participating in, the annual national conference on citizenship has one vote in the conduct of the business of the conference.
